summary: Iteration 14 Testing Complete - Dynamic PLU Scoring via GPU API. All 20 backend tests passed. New /api/scoring/plu-dynamic endpoint fetches real GPU data (zone-urba, prescription-surf, info-surf) and analyzes prescriptions, informations, and destination dominante for comprehensive PLU scoring.
passed_tests: GET /api/scoring/plu-dynamic?lon=4.94&lat=43.44 (Fos) returns gpu_source=dynamic with zone_pprt_ppr flag
plu_score_base and plu_score_dynamic_adj fields present showing base vs adjustment
gpu_data contains prescriptions_count, informations_count, risk_labels, destination_analysis
Unavailable location (ocean) returns gpu_source=unavailable with fallback
PPRT/PPR detection from GPU informations (zone_pprt_ppr flag, risk_labels: ['PPRT FOS EST'])
Destination dominante analysis: industrial_signals, residential_signals, nature_signals
POST /api/chat parcel search returns parcels with plu_scoring containing gpu_source
Chatbot auto-excludes EXCLUDED PLU parcels from results
Dashboard loads with map, layers panel, S3REnR summary
Chatbot opens and processes parcel search queries
Chatbot parcel cards show PLU score badges with color coding
ParcelDetail panel has GPU Dynamique badge when gpu_source=dynamic
ParcelDetail shows prescriptions_count and informations_count from GPU data
ParcelDetail shows risk_labels (e.g., PPRT FOS EST)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses real GPU API (apicarto.ign.fr) for PLU data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested the NEW Dynamic PLU Scoring via GPU API. Key findings: 1) GET /api/scoring/plu-dynamic?lon=X&lat=Y fetches real GPU data from apicarto.ign.fr (zone-urba, prescription-surf, info-surf) in parallel. 2) Response includes gpu_source='dynamic', plu_score_base, plu_score_dynamic_adj, and gpu_data with prescriptions_count, informations_count, risk_labels, destination_analysis. 3) Prescription analysis: EBC (-15), patrimoine (-12), limitation (-8). 4) Information analysis: PPRT/PPR (-10), ZAC (+8), voie_bruyante, archeologie. 5) Destination dominante analysis detects industrial/residential/nature keywords in libelong text. 6) Chatbot uses dynamic PLU scoring for parcel search and auto-excludes EXCLUDED parcels. 7) Frontend ParcelDetail shows GPU Dynamique badge with prescriptions/informations counts and risk labels. 8) Static PLU scoring (/api/scoring/plu/UI) still works for backward compatibility.

gpu_data.risk_labels: array of risk labels (e.g., PPRT FOS EST)

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - uses real GPU API (Géoportail de l'Urbanisme) via apicarto.ign.fr
